Dog Health Conditions

A comprehensive reference for 150 dog health conditions — grouped by body system. Understand symptoms, causes, which breeds are most at risk, and what treatment involves.

150 conditions across 13 categories

Jump to category

Autoimmune (9) Cancer (14) Cardiac (10) Dental (4) Dermatological (17) Ear (4) Endocrine (8) Eye (13) Gastrointestinal (15) Neurological (18) Orthopedic (17) Respiratory (8) Urinary (13)
9

Autoimmune

  • Brucellosis High Risk
  • Immune-Mediated Haemolytic Anaemia (IMHA) High Risk
  • Immune-Mediated Polyarthritis (IMPA) Moderate Risk
  • Immune-Mediated Thrombocytopenia (ITP) High Risk
  • Masticatory Muscle Myositis (MMM) High Risk
  • Pemphigus Foliaceus Moderate Risk
  • Polymyositis High Risk
  • Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE) High Risk
  • Von Willebrand Disease Moderate Risk
14

Cancer

  • Canine Bladder Cancer (Transitional Cell Carcinoma) High Risk
  • Cutaneous Histiocytoma Low Risk
  • Hemangiosarcoma High Risk
  • Histiocytic Sarcoma High Risk
  • Lymphoma High Risk
  • Mammary Tumours Moderate Risk
  • Mast Cell Tumour Moderate Risk
  • Nasal Tumours High Risk
  • Oral Melanoma High Risk
  • Osteosarcoma High Risk
  • Perianal Adenoma Low Risk
  • Soft Tissue Sarcoma Moderate Risk
  • Splenic Tumours (Non-Hemangiosarcoma) High Risk
  • Thyroid Tumours High Risk
10

Cardiac

  • Aortic Thromboembolism High Risk
  • Arrhythmogenic Right Ventricular Cardiomyopathy (ARVC) High Risk
  • Canine Atrial Septal Defect Moderate Risk
  • Dilated Cardiomyopathy (DCM) High Risk
  • Mitral Valve Disease (MVD) High Risk
  • Patent Ductus Arteriosus (PDA) High Risk
  • Pulmonic Stenosis Moderate Risk
  • Sick Sinus Syndrome High Risk
  • Subaortic Stenosis (SAS) High Risk
  • Tricuspid Valve Dysplasia Moderate Risk
4

Dental

  • Malocclusion Moderate Risk
  • Periodontal Disease Moderate Risk
  • Retained Deciduous Teeth Low Risk
  • Tooth Resorption Moderate Risk
17

Dermatological

  • Acral Lick Dermatitis Moderate Risk
  • Anal Furunculosis (Perianal Fistulas) High Risk
  • Atopic Dermatitis (Skin Allergies) Moderate Risk
  • Canine Follicular Dysplasia Low Risk
  • Colour Dilution Alopecia Low Risk
  • Demodex (Demodicosis) Moderate Risk
  • Dermatomyositis Moderate Risk
  • Flea Allergy Dermatitis (FAD) Moderate Risk
  • Hereditary Footpad Hyperkeratosis Moderate Risk
  • Hereditary Nasal Parakeratosis (HNPK) Low Risk
  • Hot Spots (Acute Moist Dermatitis) Low Risk
  • Interdigital Cysts (Pododermatitis) Moderate Risk
  • Malassezia Dermatitis Moderate Risk
  • Nodular Sebaceous Hyperplasia Low Risk
  • Ringworm (Dermatophytosis) Low Risk
  • Sebaceous Adenitis Moderate Risk
  • Zinc-Responsive Dermatosis Low Risk
4

Ear

  • Congenital Deafness Moderate Risk
  • Otitis Externa (Ear Infections) Low Risk
  • Otitis Media and Interna High Risk
  • Primary Secretory Otitis Media (PSOM) Moderate Risk
8

Endocrine

  • Addison's Disease (Hypoadrenocorticism) High Risk
  • Congenital Hypothyroidism with Goitre High Risk
  • Cushing's Disease (Hyperadrenocorticism) Moderate Risk
  • Diabetes Mellitus High Risk
  • Hyperlipidaemia Moderate Risk
  • Hypersomatotropism (Acromegaly) Moderate Risk
  • Hypothyroidism Low Risk
  • Insulinoma High Risk
13

Eye

  • Canine Multifocal Retinopathy Low Risk
  • Cherry Eye (Prolapsed Nictitating Membrane Gland) Low Risk
  • Collie Eye Anomaly (CEA) Moderate Risk
  • Corneal Dystrophy Low Risk
  • Ectropion Low Risk
  • Entropion Moderate Risk
  • Glaucoma High Risk
  • Hereditary Cataracts Moderate Risk
  • Keratoconjunctivitis Sicca (Dry Eye) Moderate Risk
  • Lens Luxation High Risk
  • Multifocal Acquired Retinopathy High Risk
  • Persistent Pupillary Membranes (PPM) Low Risk
  • Progressive Retinal Atrophy (PRA) High Risk
15

Gastrointestinal

  • Canine Parvovirus High Risk
  • Cleft Palate and Lip High Risk
  • Copper-Associated Hepatopathy High Risk
  • Exocrine Pancreatic Insufficiency (EPI) Moderate Risk
  • Gastric Dilatation-Volvulus (GDV / Bloat) High Risk
  • Gastroesophageal Reflux Moderate Risk
  • Hepatic Lipidosis (Fatty Liver) Moderate Risk
  • Histoplasma Infection High Risk
  • Inflammatory Bowel Disease (IBD) Moderate Risk
  • Inguinal Hernia Moderate Risk
  • Megaoesophagus High Risk
  • Pancreatitis Moderate Risk
  • Portosystemic Shunt High Risk
  • Trichobezoar (Hair Balls) and GI Foreign Bodies High Risk
  • Umbilical Hernia Low Risk
18

Neurological

  • Canine Distemper High Risk
  • Cerebellar Ataxia High Risk
  • Degenerative Myelopathy (DM) High Risk
  • Epilepsy Moderate Risk
  • Exercise-Induced Collapse (EIC) Moderate Risk
  • Fibrocartilaginous Embolism (FCE) High Risk
  • Idiopathic Vestibular Disease Moderate Risk
  • Malignant Hyperthermia High Risk
  • Multidrug Resistance Mutation (MDR1/ABCB1) High Risk
  • Narcolepsy and Cataplexy Low Risk
  • Scottie Cramp Low Risk
  • Separation Anxiety Moderate Risk
  • Spinal Muscular Atrophy High Risk
  • Spongiform Leukodystrophy High Risk
  • Syringomyelia and Chiari-Like Malformation High Risk
  • Tick-Borne Encephalitis High Risk
  • Wobbler Syndrome (Cervical Spondylomyelopathy) High Risk
  • Wobbler Syndrome in Dobermanns (Type II IVDD) High Risk
17

Orthopedic

  • Canine Hip Scoring (BVA/KC) Low Risk
  • Cranial Cruciate Ligament Rupture High Risk
  • Degenerative Joint Disease (Osteoarthritis) Moderate Risk
  • Discospondylitis High Risk
  • Elbow Dysplasia High Risk
  • Elbow Incongruency Moderate Risk
  • Hip Dysplasia High Risk
  • Hypertrophic Osteodystrophy (HOD) High Risk
  • Intervertebral Disc Disease (IVDD) High Risk
  • Legg-Calvé-Perthes Disease High Risk
  • Medial Shoulder Instability Moderate Risk
  • Osteochondritis Dissecans (OCD) Moderate Risk
  • Osteogenesis Imperfecta (Brittle Bone Disease) High Risk
  • Panosteitis Low Risk
  • Patellar Luxation Moderate Risk
  • Shoulder Osteochondrosis Moderate Risk
  • Swimmer Puppy Syndrome Moderate Risk
8

Respiratory

  • Aspiration Pneumonia High Risk
  • Blastomycosis High Risk
  • Brachycephalic Obstructive Airway Syndrome (BOAS) High Risk
  • Diaphragmatic Hernia High Risk
  • Eosinophilic Bronchopneumopathy Moderate Risk
  • Kennel Cough (Infectious Tracheobronchitis) Low Risk
  • Laryngeal Paralysis High Risk
  • Tracheal Collapse Moderate Risk
13

Urinary

  • Acute Kidney Injury (AKI) High Risk
  • Breed-Specific Juvenile Renal Disease (Soft-Coated Wheaten Terrier) High Risk
  • Chronic Kidney Disease (CKD) High Risk
  • Cryptorchidism Moderate Risk
  • Cystinuria Moderate Risk
  • Ectopic Ureters Moderate Risk
  • Fanconi Syndrome High Risk
  • Leptospirosis High Risk
  • Polycystic Kidney Disease (PKD) High Risk
  • Prostate Disease (Benign Prostatic Hyperplasia) Low Risk
  • Pyometra High Risk
  • Renal Dysplasia High Risk
  • Urinary Bladder Stones (Urolithiasis) Moderate Risk
